creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

It doesn't install properly: 

/usr/local/bin/bash ./mkinstalldirs /usr/local/bin 
/usr/bin/install -c xlogical /usr/local/bin/i386-portbld-freebsd6.2-xlogical 
chown bin:games /usr/local/bin/xlogical 
chown: /usr/local/bin/xlogical: No such file or directory 
gmake[2]: [install-exec-am] Error 1 (ignored) 
chmod 2755 /usr/local/bin/xlogical 
chmod: /usr/local/bin/xlogical: No such file or directory 
gmake[2]: *** [install-exec-am] Error 1 
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/var/ports/usr/ports/NEW/xlogical/work/xlogical-1.0-8' 
gmake[1]: *** [install-am] Error 2 
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/var/ports/usr/ports/NEW/xlogical/work/xlogical-1.0-8' 
gmake: *** [install-recursive] Error 1 
*** Error code 2 

See http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.html#USING-CONFIGURE for details.
